'''tadhugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beadleship|beadleship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beadleship|beadleship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tadhugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhigith|tædhigith]] || [[word:tædhigij|tædhigij]] || [[word:tædhigish|tædhigish]] || [[word:tædhigi|tædhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhudhuguth|tadhudhuguth]] || [[word:tadhudhuguj|tadhudhuguj]] || [[word:tadhudhugush|tadhudhugush]] || [[word:tadhudhugu|tadhudhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhuguth|tadhuguth]] || [[word:tadhuguj|tadhuguj]] || [[word:tadhugush|tadhugush]] || [[word:tadhugu|tadhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhufguth|tadhufguth]] || [[word:tadhufguj|tadhufguj]] || [[word:tadhufgush|tadhufgush]] || [[word:tadhufguf|tadhufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhuguthu|tadhuguthu]] || [[word:tadhuguju|tadhuguju]] || [[word:tadhugushu|tadhugushu]] || [[word:tadhuguku|tadhuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhuguth|tadhuguth]] || [[word:tadhuguj|tadhuguj]] || [[word:tadhugush|tadhugush]] || [[word:tadhugu|tadhugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhuguthul|tadhuguthul]] || [[word:tadhugujul|tadhugujul]] || [[word:tadhugushul|tadhugushul]] || [[word:tadhugukul|tadhugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhuguthuthu|tadhuguthuthu]] || [[word:tadhugujuju|tadhugujuju]] || [[word:tadhugushushu|tadhugushushu]] || [[word:tadhuguku|tadhuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhuguthun|tadhuguthun]] || [[word:tadhugujun|tadhugujun]] || [[word:tadhugushun|tadhugushun]] || [[word:tadhugukun|tadhugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhuguthuoro|tadhuguthuoro]] || [[word:tadhugujuoro|tadhugujuoro]] || [[word:tadhugushuoro|tadhugushuoro]] || [[word:tadhugukuoro|tadhugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
